'''Ewan Irwin''' (born 7 February 2008) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sh}} or {{rlp|so}} for the [[Warrington Wolves]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

==Background==
Irwin was born in [[Leigh, Greater Manchester]], England.<ref>[https://leighleopards.co.uk/reserves-match-report-warrington-wolves-round-2/ Reserves Match Report | Warrington Wolves | Round 2]</ref>

He played for [[Leigh Miners Rangers]] as a junior.<ref>[https://warringtonwolves.com/news/2022/september/New-Scholars-for-2023-announced/ New Scholars for 2023 announced]</ref>

==Early career==
Irwin joined the [[Warrington Wolves|Wolves]] Scholarship system aged 14 and progressed through the ranks.<ref>[https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/sport/wolves/wolvesnews/25098471.ewan-irwin-named-warrington-wolves-21-man-squad-leigh/ Ewan Irwin named in Warrington Wolves 21-man squad against Leigh]</ref>

He played for the Lancashire Origin side in 2025.<ref>[https://warringtonwolves.com/news/2025/april/Eight-young-Wires-named-in-Academy-Origin-squad/ Eight young Wires named in Academy Origin squad]</ref> 
 
Irwin captained the Wire’s Academy team during their unbeaten 2025 season, delivering a man of the match display in the 32-18 Grand Final victory over the [[Leeds Rhinos]]. He was named Warrington's Academy Player of the Year and Academy Player’s Player of the Year in 2025.<ref>[https://www.squadbuilder.co.uk/2025-review/ 2025 Review]</ref>

He added three tries and 38 goals in nine reserve team appearances for Warrington in 2025.<ref>[https://warringtonwolves.com/players/c84a05b0-47c0-11ec-89fb-6b01274c773e/ Ewan Irwin]</ref>

==Career==
In April 2025 Irwin made his début for the [[Warrington Wolves|Wire]] in the [[Super League]], coming on to debut as the 18th man against [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]].<ref>[https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/rugby-league-news-warrington-wolves-teen-star-ewan-irwin-as-different-challenge-embraced-and-more-levels-teased-114884/ Warrington Wolves teen star Ewan Irwin as ‘different challenge’ embraced and more levels teased]</ref>

In November 2025 he signed a five-year contract at the [[Halliwell Jones Stadium]] until the end of the 2030 season.<ref>[https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/sport/wolves/wolvesnews/25642022.ewan-irwin-commits-long-term-future-warrington-wolves/ Ewan Irwin commits long-term future to Warrington Wolves]</ref><ref>[https://warringtonwolves.com/news/2025/november/Rising-star-Irwin-signs-five-year-contract-until-2030/ Rising star Irwin signs five-year contract until 2030]</ref>
